title: Distributed Transformer Optimization on Exascale Architectures
authors: Dr. Sarah Chen, James Miller, Dr. Alan Turing
abstract: This paper introduces a novel communication-efficient gradient synchronization algorithm that scales linearly up to 10,000 GPUs, reducing interconnect bottlenecks by 40%.

title: Energy-Aware Scheduling for Deep Learning Workloads
abstract: We present a predictive scheduling framework that reduces cluster energy consumption by 22% without impacting training throughput or violating strict job deadlines.

title: Sparse Attention Mechanisms for Long-Context LLMs
abstract: A hardware-aware sparse attention mechanism optimized for modern HPC interconnects, enabling 1M+ token contexts with sub-quadratic memory scaling.

title: Federated Learning over High-Latency Academic Networks
abstract: An asynchronous federated learning approach designed to tolerate high-latency links between geographically distributed research institutions while maintaining differential privacy.
